prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年广西大学在上海综合类最低录取位次分别为约18200名、18448名、19420名、20693名、25917名。2021–2024年呈缓慢后移趋势，累计后移约2500名；2025年出现大幅后移，较2024年骤降约5224名，基准位次约25917名；该校在上海综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为10人，2026年计划仍为10人，连续六年持平，无扩招或缩招变化，竞争基数不变。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第94名稳步上升至2026年第86名，排名持续提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；该校未出现在近年学校声誉舆情及投档异常记录中，无显著负面事件；抖音热度总排名第25位（较热），综合热度约183万，短视频曝光量中等偏上，反映一定报考关注度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业为会计学（5人）和金融学（5人），均属财经类。近年专业热度显示金融/财经/经济类呈分化观望态势，会计/财务/审计类为推荐偏热；上海2026年普通高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，竞争显著加剧；广西大学位于广西南宁，与上海距离较远，上海考生对远距离高校存在一定地域偏好影响，但该校作为211高校仍具吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年上海考生总数激增约35%带来的竞争加剧、招生计划持平无扩招缓解，以及学校排名稳步上升的正面效应，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准25917名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约26717名，区间26217–27217名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 广西大学在上海综合类仅设金融学和会计学两个专业，招生人数各5人。位次在预测区间26217–27217名内，建议以二档会计学为主攻方向、一档金融学为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限可重点冲刺金融学。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Guangxi University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 18,200, 18,448, 19,420, 20,693, and 25,917 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a slow backward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 2,500 places; in 2025, there was a significant backward shift, dropping by about 5,224 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 25,917. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shanghai was 10 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 10 students, unchanged for six consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, keeping the competition base constant.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, with continuous improvement in ranking, enhancing its appeal to candidates. The university has not appeared in recent reputation incidents or abnormal filing records, with no significant negative events. Its Douyin popularity ranks 25th overall (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, and medium-to-high short video exposure, reflecting a certain level of application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment majors are Accounting (5 students) and Finance (5 students), both in the finance and economics category. Recent major popularity shows a divided and wait-and-see trend for finance/economics/economy categories, while accounting/finance/audit categories are recommended as relatively hot. The total number of regular college entrance exam candidates in Shanghai for 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, far from Shanghai, and Shanghai candidates have some regional preference for distant universities, but as a 211 university, it still holds appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the intensified competition due to a 35% increase in the total number of Shanghai candidates in 2026, the unchanged enrollment plan with no expansion to alleviate pressure, and the positive effect of the university's steadily rising ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 25,917. The predicted minimum ranking is about 26,717, with a range of 26,217 to 27,217.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Guangxi University offers only two majors in the comprehensive category in Shanghai: Finance and Accounting, each with 5 students. If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 26,217 to 27,217, it is recommended to focus on Accounting (Tier 2) as the main direction and aim for Finance (Tier 1) as a stretch goal. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on aiming for Finance.
